'''ây-b-g''' ('''kayabag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preambulate|preambulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preambulate|preambulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-b-g
|-
! Lemma
| kayabag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyabag|thiyabag]] || [[word:jiyabag|jiyabag]] || [[word:shiyabag|shiyabag]] || [[word:kiyabag|kiyabag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyabag|thuthuyabag]] || [[word:jujuyabag|jujuyabag]] || [[word:shushuyabag|shushuyabag]] || [[word:kukuyabag|kukuyabag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyabag|thuyabag]] || [[word:juyabag|juyabag]] || [[word:shuyabag|shuyabag]] || [[word:kuyabag|kuyabag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyabag|thuyabag]] || [[word:juyabag|juyabag]] || [[word:shuyabag|shuyabag]] || [[word:kuyabag|kuyabag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyabag|theyabag]] || [[word:jeyabag|jeyabag]] || [[word:sheyabag|sheyabag]] || [[word:keyabag|keyabag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyabag|thothoyabag]] || [[word:jojoyabag|jojoyabag]] || [[word:shoshoyabag|shoshoyabag]] || [[word:kokoyabag|kokoyabag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyabag|thoyabag]] || [[word:joyabag|joyabag]] || [[word:shoyabag|shoyabag]] || [[word:koyabag|koyabag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyabag|thoyabag]] || [[word:joyabag|joyabag]] || [[word:shoyabag|shoyabag]] || [[word:koyabag|koyabag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyabag|thĂŠyabag]] || [[word:jĂŠyabag|jĂŠyabag]] || [[word:shĂŠyabag|shĂŠyabag]] || [[word:kĂŠyabag|kĂŠyabag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayabag|thathayabag]] || [[word:jajayabag|jajayabag]] || [[word:shashayabag|shashayabag]] || [[word:kakayabag|kakayabag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayabag|thayabag]] || [[word:jayabag|jayabag]] || [[word:shayabag|shayabag]] || [[word:kayabag|kayabag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayabag|thayabag]] || [[word:jayabag|jayabag]] || [[word:shayabag|shayabag]] || [[word:kayabag|kayabag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayabag|shayabag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayabag|goshayabag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayabag|gokishayabag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayabagnĂŒ|shayabagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayabagnknĂŒ|goshayabagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayabagnĂŒ|gokishayabagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayabagshĂ«|shayabagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayabagnkshĂ«|goshayabagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayabagshĂ«|gokishayabagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayabagro|shayabagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayabagnkro|goshayabagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayabagro|gokishayabagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayabagmu|shayabagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayabagnkmu|goshayabagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayabagmu|gokishayabagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayabagsher|shayabagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayabagnksher|goshayabagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayabagsher|gokishayabagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayabagng|shayabagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayabagnkng|goshayabagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayabagng|gokishayabagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayabagya|shayabagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayabagnkya|goshayabagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayabagya|gokishayabagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayabagyam|shayabagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayabagnkyam|goshayabagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayabagyam|gokishayabagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayabagnĂŒshĂ«|shayabagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayabagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayabagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayabagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayabagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayabagnĂŒro|shayabagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayabagnknĂŒro|goshayabagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayabagnĂŒro|gokishayabagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayabagnĂŒmu|shayabagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayabagnknĂŒmu|goshayabagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayabagnĂŒmu|gokishayabagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayabagshĂ«nĂŒ|shayabagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayabagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayabagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayabagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayabagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayabagshĂ«ro|shayabagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayabagnkshĂ«ro|goshayabagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayabagshĂ«ro|gokishayabagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayabagshĂ«mu|shayabagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayabagnkshĂ«mu|goshayabagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayabagshĂ«mu|gokishayabagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayabagronĂŒ|shayabagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayabagnkronĂŒ|goshayabagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayabagronĂŒ|gokishayabagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayabagroshĂ«|shayabagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayabagnkroshĂ«|goshayabagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayabagroshĂ«|gokishayabagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayabagromu|shayabagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayabagnkromu|goshayabagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayabagromu|gokishayabagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayabagmunĂŒ|shayabagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayabagnkmunĂŒ|goshayabagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayabagmunĂŒ|gokishayabagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayabagmushĂ«|shayabagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayabagnkmushĂ«|goshayabagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayabagmushĂ«|gokishayabagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayabagmuro|shayabagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayabagnkmuro|goshayabagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayabagmuro|gokishayabagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
